rawAssistant: For the east wind that brings soot, a sturdy fabric will do well. Consider layering your cloak with a water-resistant coating or adding an extra layer of protection to keep you dry and warm. A good quality coat can make all the difference in such conditions. I have just the thing – my latest shipment of 'Mistborn' coats should suit you well, especially if you're planning on braving the road ahead.
